info.english_meaning: to respect to praise to honor
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: prAyeRAyam ANpUrvakaH  ' dared dfRAti driyate kramAd BIdAraRAdare ' (Slo.36) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'mA putraka tadAdfTAH' (E0 brA0 514) mA sma tajjIgaRaH tatrArTe cintAturo mA sma BUrityarTaH
'nipIya yasya kzitirakziRaH kaTAH samAdriyante na buDAH suDAmapi' (nE0 11) na samAdriyante na bahu manyante na gaRayantItyarTaH
'yatkiYcid durmadAH svEramAdriyante nirargalam' (mahAvIra0 73) Adriyante kAmayante spfhayante sotsukamicCanti
'iti sma pfcCatyanuvelAmAdftaH' (raGu0 35) Adfta AdaravAn sAdaraH vinItaH sannityarTaH kartari ktaH
'tO vArayituM SyanA nirdeSa AdftaH' (pA0 7210 sUtre si0 kO0) Adfta AsTita ASritaH kftaH
'yastAM viviktacaritEranuvartamAnAM nAtyAdriyata' (BA0 pu0 31621) na tAM bahvagaRayat nAmAnayat
'kaTaM nu no dUtaScaranna pratyAdfTAH' (Sa0 brA0 35116) na pratyAdfTAH sAdaraM nEkzaTAH
